content:
The things I think I want aren't who I am so every time I try to chase it it feels wrong. Is it a sign I'm going the wrong way or something I have to fight through. I don't know. The changes I want don't fit into the life that I have. I don't know if I can keep attempting this half arsed. 
I want to quit my job and go on a meditation retreat. I want to live naked in the forest. I want to get so high I meet spiritual beings. I want to be free from responsibility and expectations. 
I don't know if I can keep living for the weekend
